_description: JP Miller voice profile — extracted style rules, NOT content. Populate the 'samples' folder with 3-5 past blog posts, then run extraction to refine these directives.
_status: PLACEHOLDER — refine after populating reference/samples/ with real blog posts

sentence_rhythm.short_punch: Use 3-7 word declarative sentences to punctuate key moments. One per paragraph maximum.
sentence_rhythm.medium_flow: Default sentence length: 12-18 words. Clear subject-verb-object with one qualifier.
sentence_rhythm.long_build: Occasional 20-25 word sentences to build tension or layer context. Never two in a row.
sentence_rhythm.variation_rule: Never write 3+ sentences of similar length consecutively. Alternate between short, medium, and long.

paragraph_cadence.length_variation: Mix 1-sentence, 2-sentence, and 3-4 sentence paragraphs. Never more than 4 sentences.
paragraph_cadence.section_endings: End each section with a short, declarative statement. Period, not question mark.
paragraph_cadence.opening_variety: Vary paragraph openings: proper noun, action verb, specific detail, transition. Never start 2 consecutive paragraphs the same way.

word_choice.prefer_concrete: Choose 'welded' over 'assembled,' 'sprinted' over 'moved quickly.' Specific verbs over adverb+generic verb.
word_choice.favor_periods: Prefer periods over semicolons. Prefer shorter sentences over longer ones joined by conjunctions.
word_choice.minimize_qualifiers: Cut 'very,' 'really,' 'quite,' 'somewhat.' If the adjective needs amplifying, choose a stronger adjective.
word_choice.active_specificity: Name the tool, the person, the place. 'Maya crashed during the render' not 'the software had issues.'

structural_patterns.narrative_entry: Open with a specific scene, action, or quote — never a generalization about the industry.
structural_patterns.quote_integration: Weave quotes into narrative flow. The sentence before a quote should create the context that makes the quote land.
structural_patterns.tension_before_resolution: Always present the constraint or problem BEFORE the achievement. Never lead with the win.
structural_patterns.closing_style: End pieces with forward motion — what happens next, what this enables — not a summary of what was said.

anti_patterns.no_throat_clearing: Cut opening phrases like 'When it comes to,' 'In the world of,' 'It's no secret that.'
anti_patterns.no_false_balance: Don't hedge with 'While X is true, Y is also important.' Pick a lane.
anti_patterns.no_list_exhaustion: Don't enumerate every feature or benefit. Pick the 2-3 most vivid and let them represent the whole.
anti_patterns.no_echo_conclusions: The conclusion should add something new (a future implication, a lingering question) — never just restate the introduction.
